reviews.review_description: This is a lot of fun and the graphics are very immersive and hypnotic. The music is great too especially as the acoustics change as you go through a tunnel. I feel there could be many more crazy themes and a way to play competitively to beat a previous score. That would make it an essential VR game
Very cool and trippy 3D shooter. Would love to see more varied levels to play.

developer_response.body: Hey airons1972! Thanks for checking out FIBRE. We are working on more tracks so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Interesting short game. I suggest mapping Aim to the Go controller so you can look around freely.

I liked it, but I feel it should’ve been free for the length. There was also no rhyme to reason hitting any of the shapes in any particular order which would’ve added a bit more depth. Not bad but I would’ve passed if I knew how short it was. 

***Update after feedback from the dev***

I do enjoy this experience but at the time I did not know there was more content on the way and origInally gave this 3 stars. 

Being this is the case I will increase my score an extra star once that is released and also because for the most part it does what it sets out to do, It’s pretty fun, and will then have more levels to score chase on. 

It would also be amazing if you could add the ability to use the Go controller as a pointer device like maybe in the beginning before the game starts, or maybe in options so you can use either hand, or head tracking to aim? Would be awesome! 

I look forward to the future updates �

developer_response.body: Hello UBSERD. Thank you for buying FIBRE! We are working on more tracks so stay tuned!

hey there!
we are working on more content for the future so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Fun game! Great graphics, and motion simulation.
